description: 1 - 19-12-2024 - Google Chat Messenger exchange between Vincent Devine (Government Chief Security Officer, CO) and Junior Civil Servant (JCS

participants.name: Google Chat Messenger exchange between Vincent Devine

text:
Chief Security Officer, CO) and Junior Civil Servant (JCS

[19/12/2024, 08:27] JCS : Morning Vincent, on the vetting issue yday from
Gerard, a brief update from MR

| spoke to Gerard - it appears that there is a chance / it is likely that the individual in question
is in the HoL. On that basis, | pointed Gerard towards the GSB paper from October / Tom B
as such members don’t need to go through NSV

So, we may not need to process. Will get details today and of course we stand ready to
prioritise etc...

[19/12/2024, 08:31] Vincent Devine: Thanks. Can you chase the team on the vetting/STRAP
letter?

Sorry. That is one from yesterday that | didn’t hit send on.

[19/12/2024, 08:31] JCS no probs - Vita and JCS have been in there, there are
a few comments

[19/12/2024, 08:36] Vincent Devine: That is good on the FCDO issue. Can you dig out the
paper to see if there is flexibility? Eg, the Foreign Sec might wish to have a process in place
in any case to offer reassurance. | am also conscious the individual will need STRAP. Does
the paper say anything about DV remaining a pre-condition for that?

[19/12/2024, 08:37] JCS : yep we'll have a look now

[19/12/2024, 08:38] JCS : Looking at the paper DV for these individuals is not a
pre-condition for STRAP. The paper says

Whilst these individuals do not require NSV, if they require access to information or assets

classified at "STRAP", bailed _ Incertain
circumstances a STRAP application can be requested from those listed on the exemption
list, if it is believed to be necessary by ile . All STRAP inductees

are subject to aiid

Please contact your Security Team or local STRAP
Security Officer (STRAPSO) for further information.

[19/12/2024, 08:39] JCS : For public appointments, On a case-by-case basis - the
minister responsible for the public appointment role may request individuals listed
(paragraph 1) to undergo NSV. The Permanent Secretary has delegated authority to make
this decision as well.

What | not sure about is whether the role is a public appointment, | don’t think it is really. A
public appointment is for eg like the Childrens Commissioner

Google doc link

[19/12/2024, 08:42] Vincent Devine: Thanks. Grateful if Michael could draw the STRAP.
requirements to Gerard's attention. It will be worth asking the FCDO STRAPSO to rapidly
confirm with the authorities whether (or not) they need a STRAP application. They might...

[19/12/2024, 09:42] JCS ok
parsing_notes: Parse '[DD/MM/YYYY, HH:MM] Sender: message' tuples. Each tuple is a SENT_MESSAGE edge with timestamp. Sender names are often abbreviated (JCS = Junior Civil Servant). Build chronological message sequence within the conversation.
